transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Riverbend Care Navigation, this is Ava. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I need a refill on my blood pressure medication. It's lisinopril, ten milligrams.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sure, I can help with that. Can I get your name and date of birth to pull up your record?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks, Carla. I see your prescription with Dr. Owens, last filled about a month ago at Sunrise Pharmacy. Is that still the right pharmacy?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Yes, that's the one, on Fifth Street.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great, I'm sending the refill request to Sunrise Pharmacy now for your ten milligram lisinopril, thirty day supply.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Perfect. Do you know how long it usually takes them to fill it?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Typically it's ready within a couple hours, but I'd suggest calling ahead before you drive over.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Okay, I'll do that. Thanks so much for your help.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're welcome, Carla. Is there anything else I can assist you with today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: No, that's everything. Have a good day.
